expectations.text: Reads the Weekly Meal Plan wiki page via obsidian read
expectations.evidence: Summary states: 'Read the Weekly Meal Plan.md wiki page via obsidian read' and 'Page: Weekly Meal Plan.md, Section: ## Shopping List'

expectations.text: Extracts items from the Shopping List section (should be ~60 items)
expectations.evidence: Summary reports 'Items extracted from wiki page: 60' and lists all 60 items with categories: Fish & Seafood (4), Meat & Poultry (1), Eggs & Dairy (2), Legumes (2), Grains (5), Vegetables (18), Fruits (8), Nuts & Seeds (11), Oils & Condiments (6), Beverages (3) = 60 total

expectations.text: Checks existing Shopping list for duplicates via remindctl list Shopping --json
expectations.evidence: Summary states: 'Fetched existing Shopping list via remindctl list Shopping --json — confirmed 0 open items'

expectations.text: Adds items using remindctl add --list Shopping
expectations.evidence: Summary states: 'Added all 60 items via remindctl add "item" --list Shopping in 6 parallel batches of 10'

expectations.text: Reports correct item counts (added, skipped, total)
expectations.evidence: Summary table shows: Items extracted: 60, Items added: 60, Items skipped (duplicates): 0, Final open items: 60

expectations.text: No duplicate items were added to the Shopping list
expectations.evidence: Summary states 0 open items existed on the list pre-sync (all 48 existing were completed), so 0 duplicates were possible. All 60 adds were unique.

expectations.text: Provides a clear summary of actions taken
expectations.evidence: Summary includes a structured results table, numbered action steps, per-category breakdown, and full item listing

claims.claim: 48 existing items on Shopping list, all with isCompleted: true
claims.notes: Cannot verify from summary alone; no transcript provided

claims.claim: 6 parallel batches of 10 items were used for adding
claims.notes: No transcript to confirm parallel execution

eval_feedback.overall: Evals are thorough and discriminating. No gaps identified.
